90	
91	/* We keep a stack of the different metatexts that apply at any
92	 * given point (normally none!). Whenever we get some content
93	 * with a metatext in force, we really want to update the bounds
94	 * for that metatext. But running along the whole list each time
95	 * would be painful. So we just update the bounds for dev->metatext
96	 * and rely on metatext_bounds() propagating it upwards 'just in
97	 * time' for us to use metatexts other than the latest one. This
98	 * also means we need to propagate bounds upwards when we pop
99	 * a metatext.
100	 *
101	 * Why do we need bounds at all? Well, suppose we get:
102	 *    /Span <</ActualText (c) >> BDC /Im0 Do EMC
103	 * Then where on the page do we put 'c' ? By collecting the
104	 * bounds, we can place 'c' wherever the image was.
105	 */
106	typedef struct metatext_t
107	{
108		fz_metatext type;
109		char *text;
110		fz_rect bounds;
111		struct metatext_t *prev;
112	} metatext_t;
113	
114	typedef struct
115	{
116		fz_point from;
117		fz_point to;
118		float thickness;
119		fz_rect rect;
120		int argb;
121	} rect_details;
122	
123	typedef struct
124	{
125		fz_device super;
126		fz_stext_page *page;
127		int id;
128		fz_point pen, start;
129		// maybe_bullet: True if the 'start' position recorded was done so after either some actualtext
130		// on an image, or after a glyph that's known to be used for bullets. This is used to stop us
131		// spotting an 'indented' paragraph, because it's possibly just a bulleted list.
132		int maybe_bullet;
133		fz_point lag_pen;
134		fz_matrix trm;
135		int lastchar;
136		fz_stext_line *lastline;
137		int lastbidi;
138		int flags;
139		int color;
140		int last_was_fake_bold;
141		const fz_text *lasttext;
142		fz_stext_options opts;
143	
144		metatext_t *metatext;
145	
146		/* Store the last values we saw. We need this for flushing the actualtext. */
147		struct
148		{
149			int valid;
150			int clipped;
151			fz_matrix trm;
152			int wmode;
153			int bidi_level;
154			fz_font *font;
155			int flags;
156		} last;
157	
158		/* The list of 'rects' seen during processing (if we're collecting styles). */
159		int rect_max;
160		int rect_len;
161		rect_details *rects;
162	
163		fz_stext_block *lazy_vectors;
164		fz_stext_block *lazy_vectors_tail;
165	} fz_stext_device;
166	
167	const char *fz_stext_options_usage =
168		"Structured text options:\n"
169		"\tpreserve-images: keep images in output\n"
170		"\tpreserve-ligatures: do not expand ligatures into constituent characters\n"
171		"\tpreserve-spans: do not merge spans on the same line\n"
172		"\tpreserve-whitespace: do not convert all whitespace into space characters\n"
173		"\tinhibit-spaces: don't add spaces between gaps in the text\n"
174		"\tparagraph-break: break blocks at paragraph boundaries\n"
175		"\tdehyphenate: attempt to join up hyphenated words\n"
176		"\tignore-actualtext: do not apply ActualText replacements\n"
177		"\tuse-cid-for-unknown-unicode: use character code if unicode mapping fails\n"
178		"\tuse-gid-for-unknown-unicode: use glyph index if unicode mapping fails\n"
179		"\taccurate-bboxes: calculate char bboxes from the outlines\n"
180		"\taccurate-ascenders: calculate ascender/descender from font glyphs\n"
181		"\taccurate-side-bearings: expand char bboxes to completely include width of glyphs\n"
182		"\tcollect-styles: attempt to detect text features (fake bold, strikeout, underlined etc)\n"
183		"\tclip: do not include text that is completely clipped\n"
184		"\tclip-rect=x0:y0:x1:y1 specify clipping rectangle within which to collect content\n"
185		"\tstructured: collect structure markup\n"
186		"\tvectors: include vector bboxes in output\n"
187		"\tlazy-vectors: delay vectors that would otherwise split a text line\n"
188		"\tfuzzy-vectors: merge abutting horizontal/vertical vectors\n"
189		"\tsegment: attempt to segment the page\n"
190		"\ttable-hunt: hunt for tables within a (segmented) page\n"
191		"\tresolution: resolution to render at\n"
192		"\n";
193	
194	/* Find the current actualtext, if any. Will abort if dev == NULL. */
195	static metatext_t *
196	find_actualtext(fz_stext_device *dev)
197	{
198		metatext_t *mt = dev->metatext;
199	
200		while (mt && mt->type != FZ_METATEXT_ACTUALTEXT)
201			mt = mt->prev;
202	
203		return mt;
204	}
205	
206	/* Find the bounds of the given metatext. Will abort if mt or
207	 * dev are NULL. */
208	static fz_rect *
209	metatext_bounds(metatext_t *mt, fz_stext_device *dev)
210	{
211		metatext_t *mt2 = dev->metatext;
212	
213		while (mt2 != mt)
214		{
215			mt2->prev->bounds = fz_union_rect(mt2->prev->bounds, mt2->bounds);
216			mt2 = mt2->prev;
217		}
218	
219		return &mt->bounds;
220	}
221	
222	/* Find the bounds of the current actualtext, or NULL if there
223	 * isn't one. Will abort if dev is NULL. */
224	static fz_rect *
225	actualtext_bounds(fz_stext_device *dev)
226	{
227		metatext_t *mt = find_actualtext(dev);
228	
229		if (mt == NULL)
230			return NULL;
231	
232		return metatext_bounds(mt, dev);
233	}
234	
235	fz_stext_page *
236	fz_new_stext_page(fz_context *ctx, fz_rect mediabox)
237	{
238		fz_pool *pool = fz_new_pool(ctx);
239		fz_stext_page *page = NULL;
240		fz_try(ctx)
241		{
242			page = fz_pool_alloc(ctx, pool, sizeof(*page));
243			page->refs = 1;
244			page->pool = pool;
245			page->mediabox = mediabox;
246			page->first_block = NULL;
247			page->last_block = NULL;
248			page->id_list = fz_new_pool_array(ctx, pool, fz_stext_page_details, 4);
249		}
250		fz_catch(ctx)
251		{
252			fz_drop_pool(ctx, pool);
253			fz_rethrow(ctx);
254		}
255		return page;
256	}
257	
258	static void
259	drop_run(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_block *block)
260	{
261		fz_stext_line *line;
262		fz_stext_char *ch;
263		while (block)
264		{
265			switch (block->type)
266			{
267			case FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_IMAGE:
268				fz_drop_image(ctx, block->u.i.image);
269				break;
270			case FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_TEXT:
271				for (line = block->u.t.first_line; line; line = line->next)
272					for (ch = line->first_char; ch; ch = ch->next)
273						fz_drop_font(ctx, ch->font);
274				break;
275			case FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_STRUCT:
276				drop_run(ctx, block->u.s.down->first_block);
277				break;
278			default:
279				break;
280			}
281			block = block->next;
282		}
283	}
284	
285	fz_stext_page_details *fz_stext_page_details_for_block(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, fz_stext_block *block)
286	{
287		if (block == NULL || page == NULL)
288			fz_throw(ctx, FZ_ERROR_ARGUMENT, "page details require a page and a block");
289	
290		return (fz_stext_page_details *)fz_pool_array_lookup(ctx, page->id_list, block->id);
291	}
292	
293	fz_stext_page *
294	fz_keep_stext_page(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page)
295	{
296		return fz_keep_imp(ctx, page, &page->refs);
297	}
298	
299	void
300	fz_drop_stext_page(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page)
301	{
302		if (page == NULL)
303			return;
304	
305		if (fz_drop_imp(ctx, page, &page->refs))
306		{
307			drop_run(ctx, page->first_block);
308			fz_drop_pool(ctx, page->pool);
309		}
310	}
311	
312	/*
313	 * This adds a new block at the end of the page. This should not be used
314	 * to add 'struct' blocks to the page as those have to be added internally,
315	 * with more complicated pointer setup.
316	 */
317	static fz_stext_block *
318	add_block_to_page(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, int type, int id)
319	{
320		fz_stext_block *block = fz_pool_alloc(ctx, page->pool, sizeof *page->first_block);
321		block->bbox = fz_empty_rect; /* Fixes bug 703267. */
322		block->prev = page->last_block;
323		block->type = type;
324		block->id = id;
325		if (page->last_struct)
326		{
327			if (page->last_struct->last_block)
328			{
329				block->prev = page->last_struct->last_block;
330				block->prev->next = block;
331				page->last_struct->last_block = block;
332			}
333			else
334				page->last_struct->last_block = page->last_struct->first_block = block;
335		}
336		else if (!page->last_block)
337		{
338			assert(!page->first_block);
339			page->first_block = page->last_block = block;
340		}
341		else
342		{
343			page->last_block->next = block;
344			page->last_block = block;
345		}
346		return block;
347	}
348	
349	static fz_stext_block *
350	add_lazy_vector(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, fz_stext_device *tdev, int id)
351	{
352		fz_stext_block *block = fz_pool_alloc(ctx, page->pool, sizeof *page->first_block);
353		block->bbox = fz_empty_rect;
354		block->prev = tdev->lazy_vectors_tail;
355		block->type = FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_VECTOR;
356		block->id = id;
357	
358		if (tdev->lazy_vectors == NULL)
359			tdev->lazy_vectors = block;
360		else
361			tdev->lazy_vectors_tail->next = block;
362		tdev->lazy_vectors_tail = block;
363	
364		return block;
365	}
366	
367	static void
368	flush_lazy_vectors(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, fz_stext_device *tdev)
369	{
370		if (tdev->lazy_vectors == NULL)
371			return;
372	
373		if (page->last_struct)
374		{
375			if (page->last_struct->last_block)
376			{
377				page->last_struct->last_block->next = tdev->lazy_vectors;
378				tdev->lazy_vectors->prev = page->last_struct->last_block;
379				page->last_struct->last_block = tdev->lazy_vectors_tail;
380			}
381			else
382			{
383				page->last_struct->first_block = tdev->lazy_vectors;
384				page->last_struct->last_block = tdev->lazy_vectors_tail;
385			}
386		}
387		else if (!page->last_block)
388		{
389			page->first_block = tdev->lazy_vectors;
390			page->last_block = tdev->lazy_vectors_tail;
391		}
392		else
393		{
394			page->last_block->next = tdev->lazy_vectors;
395			tdev->lazy_vectors->prev = page->last_block;
396			page->last_block = tdev->lazy_vectors_tail;
397		}
398	
399		tdev->lazy_vectors = tdev->lazy_vectors_tail = NULL;
400	}
401	
402	static fz_stext_block *
403	add_text_block_to_page(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, int id)
404	{
405		return add_block_to_page(ctx, page, FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_TEXT, id);
406	}

408	static fz_stext_block *
409	add_image_block_to_page(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, fz_matrix ctm, fz_image *image, int id)
410	{
411		fz_stext_block *block = add_block_to_page(ctx, page, FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_IMAGE, id);
412		block->u.i.transform = ctm;
413		block->u.i.image = fz_keep_image(ctx, image);
414		block->bbox = fz_transform_rect(fz_unit_rect, ctm);
415		return block;
416	}

418	static fz_stext_line *
419	add_line_to_block(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, fz_stext_block *block, const fz_point *dir, int wmode, int bidi)
420	{
421		fz_stext_line *line = fz_pool_alloc(ctx, page->pool, sizeof *block->u.t.first_line);
422		line->prev = block->u.t.last_line;
423		if (!block->u.t.first_line)
424			block->u.t.first_line = block->u.t.last_line = line;
425		else
426		{
427			block->u.t.last_line->next = line;
428			block->u.t.last_line = line;
429		}
430	
431		line->dir = *dir;
432		line->wmode = wmode;
433	
434		return line;
435	}
436	
437	#define NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH_ADDED_SPACE (-2)
438	#define NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH (-1)
439	
440	static fz_stext_char *
441	add_char_to_line(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_page *page, fz_stext_line *line, fz_matrix trm, fz_font *font, float size, int c, int glyph, fz_point *p, fz_point *q, int bidi, int color, int synthetic, int flags, int dev_flags)
442	{
443		fz_stext_char *ch = fz_pool_alloc(ctx, page->pool, sizeof *line->first_char);
444		fz_point a, d;
445	
446		if (!line->first_char)
447			line->first_char = line->last_char = ch;
448		else
449		{
450			line->last_char->next = ch;
451			line->last_char = ch;
452		}
453	
454		ch->c = c;
455		ch->argb = color;
456		ch->bidi = bidi;
457		ch->origin = *p;
458		ch->size = size;
459		ch->font = fz_keep_font(ctx, font);
460		ch->flags = flags | (synthetic ? FZ_STEXT_SYNTHETIC : 0) | (synthetic > 1 ? FZ_STEXT_SYNTHETIC_LARGE : 0);
461		if (font->flags.is_bold)
462			ch->flags |= FZ_STEXT_BOLD;
463	
464		if (line->wmode == 0)
465		{
466			fz_rect bounds;
467			int bounded = 0;
468			a.x = 0;
469			d.x = 0;
470			if (glyph == NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH_ADDED_SPACE)
471			{
472				/* Added space, in accurate mode. */
473				a.y = d.y = 0;
474			}
475			else if (glyph == NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH)
476			{
477				/* Non accurate mode. */
478				a.y = fz_font_ascender(ctx, font);
479				d.y = fz_font_descender(ctx, font);
480			}
481			else
482			{
483				/* Any glyph in accurate mode */
484				bounds = fz_bound_glyph(ctx, font, glyph, fz_identity);
485				bounded = 1;
486				a.y = bounds.y1;
487				d.y = bounds.y0;
488			}
489			if (dev_flags & FZ_STEXT_ACCURATE_SIDE_BEARINGS)
490			{
491				if (!bounded)
492					bounds = fz_bound_glyph(ctx, font, glyph, fz_identity);
493				if (a.x > bounds.x0)
494					a.x = bounds.x0;
495				if (d.y < bounds.x1)
496					d.y = bounds.x1;
497			}
498		}
499		else
500		{
501			a.x = 1;
502			d.x = 0;
503			a.y = 0;
504			d.y = 0;
505		}
506		a = fz_transform_vector(a, trm);
507		d = fz_transform_vector(d, trm);
508	
509		ch->quad.ll = fz_make_point(p->x + d.x, p->y + d.y);
510		ch->quad.ul = fz_make_point(p->x + a.x, p->y + a.y);
511		ch->quad.lr = fz_make_point(q->x + d.x, q->y + d.y);
512		ch->quad.ur = fz_make_point(q->x + a.x, q->y + a.y);
513	
514		return ch;
515	}
516	
517	static fz_stext_char *reverse_bidi_span(fz_stext_char *curr, fz_stext_char *tail)
518	{
519		fz_stext_char *prev, *next;
520		prev = tail;
521		while (curr != tail)
522		{
523			next = curr->next;
524			curr->next = prev;
525			prev = curr;
526			curr = next;
527		}
528		return prev;
529	}
530	
531	static void reverse_bidi_line(fz_stext_line *line)
532	{
533		fz_stext_char *a, *b, **prev;
534		prev = &line->first_char;
535		for (a = line->first_char; a; a = a->next)
536		{
537			if (a->bidi)
538			{
539				b = a;
540				while (b->next && b->next->bidi)
541					b = b->next;
542				if (a != b)
543					*prev = reverse_bidi_span(a, b->next);
544			}
545			prev = &a->next;
546			line->last_char = a;
547		}
548	}
549	
550	int fz_is_unicode_hyphen(int c)
551	{
552		/* check for: hyphen-minus, soft hyphen, hyphen, and non-breaking hyphen */
553		return (c == '-' || c == 0xAD || c == 0x2010 || c == 0x2011);
554	}
555	
556	static float
557	vec_dot(const fz_point *a, const fz_point *b)
558	{
559		return a->x * b->x + a->y * b->y;
560	}
561	
562	static int may_add_space(int lastchar)
563	{
564		/* Basic latin, greek, cyrillic, hebrew, arabic,
565		 * general punctuation,
566		 * superscripts and subscripts,
567		 * and currency symbols.
568		 */
569		return (lastchar != ' ' && (lastchar < 0x700 || (lastchar >= 0x2000 && lastchar <= 0x20CF)));
570	}
571	
572	#define FAKEBOLD_THRESHOLD_RECIP (1.0f / FAKE_BOLD_MAX_DIST)
573	
574	static int
575	is_within_fake_bold_distance(float a, float b, float size)
576	{
577		a -= b;
578		if (a < 0)
579			a = -a;
580	
581		return FAKEBOLD_THRESHOLD_RECIP * a < size;
582	}
583	
584	static int
585	font_equiv(fz_context *ctx, fz_font *f, fz_font *g)
586	{
587		unsigned char fdigest[16];
588		unsigned char gdigest[16];
589	
590		if (f == g)
591			return 1;
592	
593		if (strcmp(f->name, g->name) != 0)
594			return 0;
595	
596		if (f->buffer == NULL || g->buffer == NULL)
597			return 0;
598	
599		fz_font_digest(ctx, f, fdigest);
600		fz_font_digest(ctx, g, gdigest);
601	
602		return (memcmp(fdigest, gdigest, 16) == 0);
603	}
604	
605	static int
606	check_for_fake_bold(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_block *block, fz_font *font, int c, fz_point p, float size, int flags)
607	{
608		fz_stext_line *line;
609		fz_stext_char *ch;
610	
611		for (; block != NULL; block = block->next)
612		{
613			if (block->type == FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_STRUCT)
614			{
615				if (block->u.s.down != NULL && check_for_fake_bold(ctx, block->u.s.down->first_block, font, c, p, size, flags))
616					return 1;
617			}
618			else if (block->type == FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_TEXT)
619			{
620				for (line = block->u.t.first_line; line != NULL; line = line->next)
621				{
622					fz_stext_char *pr = NULL;
623					for (ch = line->first_char; ch != NULL; ch = ch->next)
624					{
625						/* Not perfect, but it'll do! */
626						if (ch->c == c && is_within_fake_bold_distance(ch->origin.x, p.x, size) && is_within_fake_bold_distance(ch->origin.y, p.y, size) && font_equiv(ctx, ch->font, font))
627						{
628							/* If we were filled before, and we are stroking now... */
629							if ((ch->flags & (FZ_STEXT_FILLED | FZ_STEXT_STROKED)) == FZ_STEXT_FILLED &&
630								(flags & (FZ_STEXT_FILLED | FZ_STEXT_STROKED)) == FZ_STEXT_STROKED)
631							{
632								/* Update this to be filled + stroked, but don't specifically mark it as fake bold. */
633								ch->flags |= flags;
634								return 1;
635							}
636							/* Overlaying spaces is tricksy. How can that count as boldening when it doesn't mark? We only accept these
637							 * as boldening if either the char before, or the char after were also boldened. */
638							ch->flags |= flags;
639	
640							if (c == ' ')
641							{
642								if ((pr && (pr->flags & FZ_STEXT_BOLD) != 0) ||
643									(ch->next && (ch->next->flags & FZ_STEXT_BOLD) != 0))
644								{
645									/* OK, we can be bold. */
646									ch->flags |= FZ_STEXT_BOLD;
647								}
648								/* Whether we have recorded this as being bold or not, still
649								 * claim we did, so we swallow the space and don't reemit it. */
650								return 1;
651							}
652							else
653							{
654								ch->flags |= FZ_STEXT_BOLD;
655								return 1;
656							}
657						}
658						pr = ch;
659					}
660				}
661			}
662		}
663	
664		return 0;
665	}
666	
667	static int
668	plausible_bullet(int c)
669	{
670		return (c == '*' ||
671			c == 0x00B7 || /* Middle Dot */
672			c == 0x2022 || /* Bullet */
673			c == 0x2023 || /* Triangular Bullet */
674			c == 0x2043 || /* Hyphen Bullet */
675			c == 0x204C || /* Back leftwards bullet */
676			c == 0x204D || /* Back rightwards bullet */
677			c == 0x2219 || /* Bullet operator */
678			c == 0x25C9 || /* Fisheye */
679			c == 0x25CB || /* White circle */
680			c == 0x25CF || /* Black circle */
681			c == 0x25D8 || /* Inverse Bullet */
682			c == 0x25E6 || /* White Bullet */
683			c == 0x2619 || /* Reversed Rotated Floral Heart Bullet / Fleuron */
684			c == 0x261a || /* Black left pointing index */
685			c == 0x261b || /* Black right pointing index */
686			c == 0x261c || /* White left pointing index */
687			c == 0x261d || /* White up pointing index */
688			c == 0x261e || /* White right pointing index */
689			c == 0x261f || /* White down pointing index */
690			c == 0x2765 || /* Rotated Heavy Heart Black Heart Bullet */
691			c == 0x2767 || /* Rotated Floral Heart Bullet / Fleuron */
692			c == 0x29BE || /* Circled White Bullet */
693			c == 0x29BF || /* Circled Bullet */
694			c == 0x2660 || /* Black Spade suit */
695			c == 0x2661 || /* White Heart suit */
696			c == 0x2662 || /* White Diamond suit */
697			c == 0x2663 || /* Black Club suit */
698			c == 0x2664 || /* White Spade suit */
699			c == 0x2665 || /* Black Heart suit */
700			c == 0x2666 || /* Black Diamond suit */
701			c == 0x2667 || /* White Clud suit */
702			c == 0x1F446 || /* WHITE UP POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
703			c == 0x1F447 || /* WHITE DOWN POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
704			c == 0x1F448 || /* WHITE LEFT POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
705			c == 0x1F449 || /* WHITE RIGHT POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
706			c == 0x1f597 || /* White down pointing left hand index */
707			c == 0x1F598 || /* SIDEWAYS WHITE LEFT POINTING INDEX */
708			c == 0x1F599 || /* SIDEWAYS WHITE RIGHT POINTING INDEX */
709			c == 0x1F59A || /* SIDEWAYS BLACK LEFT POINTING INDEX */
710			c == 0x1F59B || /* SIDEWAYS BLACK RIGHT POINTING INDEX */
711			c == 0x1F59C || /* BLACK LEFT POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
712			c == 0x1F59D || /* BLACK RIGHT POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
713			c == 0x1F59E || /* SIDEWAYS WHITE UP POINTING INDEX */
714			c == 0x1F59F || /* SIDEWAYS WHITE DOWN POINTING INDEX */
715			c == 0x1F5A0 || /* SIDEWAYS BLACK UP POINTING INDEX */
716			c == 0x1F5A1 || /* SIDEWAYS BLACK DOWN POINTING INDEX */
717			c == 0x1F5A2 || /* BLACK UP POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
718			c == 0x1F5A3 || /* BLACK DOWN POINTING BACKHAND INDEX */
719			c == 0x1FBC1 || /* LEFT THIRD WHITE RIGHT POINTING INDEX */
720			c == 0x1FBC2 || /* MIDDLE THIRD WHITE RIGHT POINTING INDEX */
721			c == 0x1FBC3 || /* RIGHT THIRD WHITE RIGHT POINTING INDEX */
722			c == 0xFFFD || /* UNICODE_REPLACEMENT_CHARACTER */
723			(c >= '0' && c <= '9') ||
724			0);
725	}
726	
727	static void
728	fz_add_stext_char_imp(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev, fz_font *font, int c, int glyph, fz_matrix trm, float adv, int wmode, int bidi, int force_new_line, int flags)
729	{
730		fz_stext_page *page = dev->page;
731		fz_stext_block *cur_block;
732		fz_stext_line *cur_line = NULL;
733	
734		int new_para = 0;
735		int new_line = 1;
736		int add_space = 0;
737		fz_point dir, ndir, p, q;
738		float size;
739		fz_point delta;
740		float spacing = 0;
741		float base_offset = 0;
742		float dist;
743	
744		/* Preserve RTL-ness only (and ignore level) so we can use bit 2 as "visual" tag for reordering pass. */
745		bidi = bidi & 1;
746	
747		/* dir = direction vector for motion. ndir = normalised(dir) */
748		if (wmode == 0)
749		{
750			dir.x = 1;
751			dir.y = 0;
752		}
753		else
754		{
755			dir.x = 0;
756			dir.y = -1;
757		}
758		dir = fz_transform_vector(dir, trm);
759		ndir = fz_normalize_vector(dir);
760	
761		size = fz_matrix_expansion(trm);
762	
763		/* We need to identify where glyphs 'start' (p) and 'stop' (q).
764		 * Each glyph holds its 'start' position, and the next glyph in the
765		 * span (or span->max if there is no next glyph) holds its 'end'
766		 * position.
767		 *
768		 * For both horizontal and vertical motion, trm->{e,f} gives the
769		 * origin (usually the bottom left) of the glyph.
770		 *
771		 * In horizontal mode:
772		 *   + p is bottom left.
773		 *   + q is the bottom right
774		 * In vertical mode:
775		 *   + p is top left (where it advanced from)
776		 *   + q is bottom left
777		 */
778		if (wmode == 0)
779		{
780			p.x = trm.e;
781			p.y = trm.f;
782			q.x = trm.e + adv * dir.x;
783			q.y = trm.f + adv * dir.y;
784		}
785		else
786		{
787			p.x = trm.e - adv * dir.x;
788			p.y = trm.f - adv * dir.y;
789			q.x = trm.e;
790			q.y = trm.f;
791		}
792	
793		//printf("%g,%g \"%c\" %g,%g\n", p.x, p.y, c, q.x, q.y);
794	
795		if ((dev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_COLLECT_STYLES) != 0)
796		{
797			if (glyph < 0)
798			{
799				if (dev->last_was_fake_bold)
800					return;
801			}
802			else if (check_for_fake_bold(ctx, page->first_block, font, c, p, size, flags))
803			{
804				dev->last_was_fake_bold = 1;
805				return;
806			}
807			dev->last_was_fake_bold = 0;
808		}
809	
810		/* Find current position to enter new text. */
811		cur_block = page->last_struct ? page->last_struct->last_block : page->last_block;
812		if (cur_block && cur_block->type != FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_TEXT)
813			cur_block = NULL;
814		cur_line = cur_block ? cur_block->u.t.last_line : NULL;
815	
816		/* We use glyph == -2 to indicate the first no-glyph char from an actualtext. The position
817		 * is valid though, so we want to advance the pen for these. */
818	
819		/* Don't advance pen or break lines for either no-glyph or marking non-spacing characters in a cluster */
820		if (cur_line && (glyph == -1 || ucdn_get_general_category(c) == UCDN_GENERAL_CATEGORY_MN))
821		{
822			add_char_to_line(ctx, page, cur_line, trm, font, size, c, (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_ACCURATE_BBOXES) ? glyph : NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH, &dev->pen, &dev->pen, bidi, dev->color, 0, flags, dev->flags);
823			dev->lastbidi = bidi;
824			dev->lastchar = c;
825			dev->lastline = cur_line;
826			return;
827		}
828	
829		if (cur_line == NULL || cur_line->wmode != wmode || vec_dot(&ndir, &cur_line->dir) < 0.999f)
830		{
831			/* If the matrix has changed rotation, or the wmode is different (or if we don't have a line at all),
832			 * then we can't append to the current block/line. */
833			new_para = 1;
834			new_line = 1;
835		}
836		else
837		{
838			/* Detect fake bold where text is printed twice in the same place. */
839			/* Largely supplanted by the check_for_fake_bold mechanism above,
840			 * but we leave this in for backward compatibility as it's cheap,
841			 * and works even when FZ_STEXT_COLLECT_STYLES is not set. */
842			dist = hypotf(p.x - dev->lag_pen.x, p.y - dev->lag_pen.y) / size;
843			/* This can trigger improperly for glyphs that come from actualtext
844			 * as they are frequently overlaid. Therefore rely on glyph >= 0. */
845			if (dist < FAKE_BOLD_MAX_DIST && c == dev->lastchar && glyph >= 0)
846				return;
847	
848			/* Calculate how far we've moved since the last character. */
849			delta.x = p.x - dev->pen.x;
850			delta.y = p.y - dev->pen.y;
851	
852			/* The transform has not changed, so we know we're in the same
853			 * direction. Calculate 2 distances; how far off the previous
854			 * baseline we are, together with how far along the baseline
855			 * we are from the expected position. */
856			spacing = (ndir.x * delta.x + ndir.y * delta.y) / size;
857			base_offset = (-ndir.y * delta.x + ndir.x * delta.y) / size;
858	
859			/* Only a small amount off the baseline - we'll take this */
860			if (fabsf(base_offset) < BASE_MAX_DIST)
861			{
862				/* If mixed LTR and RTL content */
863				if ((bidi & 1) != (dev->lastbidi & 1))
864				{
865					/* Ignore jumps within line when switching between LTR and RTL text. */
866					new_line = 0;
867				}
868	
869				/* RTL */
870				else if (bidi & 1)
871				{
872					fz_point logical_delta = fz_make_point(p.x - dev->lag_pen.x, p.y - dev->lag_pen.y);
873					float logical_spacing = (ndir.x * logical_delta.x + ndir.y * logical_delta.y) / size + adv;
874	
875					/* If the pen is where we would have been if we
876					 * had advanced backwards from the previous
877					 * character by this character's advance, we
878					 * are probably seeing characters emitted in
879					 * logical order.
880					 */
881					if (fabsf(logical_spacing) < SPACE_DIST)
882					{
883						new_line = 0;
884					}
885	
886					/* However, if the pen has advanced to where we would expect it
887					 * in an LTR context, we're seeing them emitted in visual order
888					 * and should flag them for reordering!
889					 */
890					else if (fabsf(spacing) < SPACE_DIST)
891					{
892						bidi = 3; /* mark line as visual */
893						new_line = 0;
894					}
895	
896					/* And any other small jump could be a missing space. */
897					else if (logical_spacing < 0 && logical_spacing > -SPACE_MAX_DIST)
898					{
899						if (wmode == 0 && may_add_space(dev->lastchar))
900							add_space = 1;
901						new_line = 0;
902					}
903					else if (spacing < 0 && spacing > -SPACE_MAX_DIST)
904					{
905						/* Motion is in line, but negative. We've probably got overlapping
906						 * chars here. Live with it. */
907						new_line = 0;
908					}
909					else if (spacing > 0 && spacing < SPACE_MAX_DIST)
910					{
911						bidi = 3; /* mark line as visual */
912						if (wmode == 0 && may_add_space(dev->lastchar))
913							add_space = 1 + (spacing > SPACE_DIST*2);
914						new_line = 0;
915					}
916	
917					else
918					{
919						/* Motion is large and unexpected (probably a new table column). */
920						new_line = 1;
921					}
922				}
923	
924				/* LTR or neutral character */
925				else
926				{
927					if (fabsf(spacing) < SPACE_DIST)
928					{
929						/* Motion is in line and small enough to ignore. */
930						new_line = 0;
931					}
932					else if (spacing < 0 && spacing > -SPACE_MAX_DIST)
933					{
934						/* Motion is in line, but negative. We've probably got overlapping
935						 * chars here. Live with it. */
936						new_line = 0;
937					}
938					else if (spacing > 0 && spacing < SPACE_MAX_DIST)
939					{
940						/* Motion is forward in line and large enough to warrant us adding a space. */
941						if (wmode == 0 && may_add_space(dev->lastchar))
942							add_space = 1 + (spacing > SPACE_DIST*2);
943						new_line = 0;
944					}
945					else
946					{
947						/* Motion is large and unexpected (probably a new table column). */
948						new_line = 1;
949					}
950				}
951			}
952	
953			/* Enough for a new line, but not enough for a new paragraph */
954			else if (fabsf(base_offset) <= PARAGRAPH_DIST)
955			{
956				/* Check indent to spot text-indent style paragraphs */
957				if (wmode == 0 && cur_line)
958					if ((p.x - dev->start.x) > 0.5f && !dev->maybe_bullet)
959						new_para = 1;
960				new_line = 1;
961			}
962	
963			/* Way off the baseline - open a new paragraph */
964			else
965			{
966				new_para = 1;
967				new_line = 1;
968			}
969		}
970	
971		/* Start a new block (but only at the beginning of a text object) */
972		if (new_para || !cur_block)
973		{
974			flush_lazy_vectors(ctx, page, dev);
975			cur_block = add_text_block_to_page(ctx, page, dev->id);
976			cur_line = cur_block->u.t.last_line;
977		}
978	
979		if (new_line && (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_DEHYPHENATE) && fz_is_unicode_hyphen(dev->lastchar) && dev->lastline != NULL)
980			dev->lastline->flags |= FZ_STEXT_LINE_FLAGS_JOINED;
981	
982		/* Start a new line */
983		if (new_line || !cur_line || force_new_line)
984		{
985			cur_line = add_line_to_block(ctx, page, cur_block, &ndir, wmode, bidi);
986			dev->start = p;
987			if (glyph == -2)
988				dev->maybe_bullet = 1;
989			else
990				dev->maybe_bullet = plausible_bullet(c);
991		}
992	
993		/* Henceforth treat such non-glyphs in the usual way. */
994		if (glyph == -2)
995			glyph = -1;
996	
997		/* Add synthetic space */
998		if (c != ' ' && add_space && !(dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_INHIBIT_SPACES))
999			add_char_to_line(ctx, page, cur_line, trm, font, size, ' ', (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_ACCURATE_BBOXES) ? NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH_ADDED_SPACE : NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH, &dev->pen, &p, bidi, dev->color, add_space, flags, dev->flags);
1000	
1001		add_char_to_line(ctx, page, cur_line, trm, font, size, c, (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_ACCURATE_BBOXES) ? glyph : NON_ACCURATE_GLYPH, &p, &q, bidi, dev->color, 0, flags, dev->flags);
1002	
1003		dev->lastchar = c;
1004		dev->lastbidi = bidi;
1005		dev->lastline = cur_line;
1006		dev->lag_pen = p;
1007		dev->pen = q;
1008	
1009		dev->trm = trm;
1010	}
1011	
1012	static void
1013	fz_add_stext_char(fz_context *ctx,
1014		fz_stext_device *dev,
1015		fz_font *font,
1016		int c,
1017		int glyph,
1018		fz_matrix trm,
1019		float adv,
1020		int wmode,
1021		int bidi,
1022		int force_new_line,
1023		int flags)
1024	{
1025		/* ignore when one unicode character maps to multiple glyphs */
1026		if (c == -1)
1027			return;
1028	
1029		if (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_ACCURATE_ASCENDERS)
1030			fz_calculate_font_ascender_descender(ctx, font);
1031	
1032		if (!(dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_LIGATURES))
1033		{
1034			switch (c)
1035			{
1036			case 0xFB00: /* ff */
1037				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1038				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1039				return;
1040			case 0xFB01: /* fi */
1041				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1042				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'i', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1043				return;
1044			case 0xFB02: /* fl */
1045				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1046				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'l', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1047				return;
1048			case 0xFB03: /* ffi */
1049				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1050				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1051				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'i', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1052				return;
1053			case 0xFB04: /* ffl */
1054				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1055				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'f', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1056				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 'l', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1057				return;
1058			case 0xFB05: /* long st */
1059			case 0xFB06: /* st */
1060				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 's', glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1061				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, 't', -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1062				return;
1063			}
1064	
1065			/* alphabetic and arabic presentation forms */
1066			if ((c >= 0xfb00 && c <= 0xfdff) || (c >= 0xfe70 && c <= 0xfefc))
1067			{
1068				uint32_t lig[18];
1069				int i, n = ucdn_compat_decompose(c, lig);
1070				fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, lig[0], glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1071				for (i = 1; i < n; ++i)
1072					fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, lig[i], -1, trm, 0, wmode, bidi, 0, flags);
1073				return;
1074			}
1075		}
1076	
1077		if (!(dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_WHITESPACE))
1078		{
1079			switch (c)
1080			{
1081			case 0x0009: /* tab */
1082			case 0x0020: /* space */
1083			case 0x00A0: /* no-break space */
1084			case 0x1680: /* ogham space mark */
1085			case 0x180E: /* mongolian vowel separator */
1086			case 0x2000: /* en quad */
1087			case 0x2001: /* em quad */
1088			case 0x2002: /* en space */
1089			case 0x2003: /* em space */
1090			case 0x2004: /* three-per-em space */
1091			case 0x2005: /* four-per-em space */
1092			case 0x2006: /* six-per-em space */
1093			case 0x2007: /* figure space */
1094			case 0x2008: /* punctuation space */
1095			case 0x2009: /* thin space */
1096			case 0x200A: /* hair space */
1097			case 0x202F: /* narrow no-break space */
1098			case 0x205F: /* medium mathematical space */
1099			case 0x3000: /* ideographic space */
1100				c = ' ';
1101			}
1102		}
1103	
1104		fz_add_stext_char_imp(ctx, dev, font, c, glyph, trm, adv, wmode, bidi, force_new_line, flags);
1105	}
1106	
1107	static fz_rect
1108	current_clip(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev)
1109	{
1110		fz_rect r = fz_infinite_rect;
1111	
1112		if (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_CLIP)
1113		{
1114			r = fz_device_current_scissor(ctx, &dev->super);
1115			r = fz_intersect_rect(r, dev->page->mediabox);
1116		}
1117		if (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_CLIP_RECT)
1118			r = fz_intersect_rect(r, dev->opts.clip);
1119	
1120		return r;
1121	}
1122	
1123	static void
1124	do_extract(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev, fz_text_span *span, fz_matrix ctm, int start, int end, int flags)
1125	{
1126		fz_font *font = span->font;
1127		fz_matrix tm = span->trm;
1128		float adv;
1129		int unicode;
1130		int i;
1131	
1132		for (i = start; i < end; i++)
1133		{
1134			if (dev->flags & (FZ_STEXT_CLIP | FZ_STEXT_CLIP_RECT))
1135			{
1136				fz_rect r = current_clip(ctx, dev);
1137				if (fz_glyph_entirely_outside_box(ctx, &ctm, span, &span->items[i], &r))
1138				{
1139					dev->last.clipped = 1;
1140					continue;
1141				}
1142			}
1143			dev->last.clipped = 0;
1144	
1145			/* Calculate new pen location and delta */
1146			tm.e = span->items[i].x;
1147			tm.f = span->items[i].y;
1148			dev->last.trm = fz_concat(tm, ctm);
1149			dev->last.bidi_level = span->bidi_level;
1150			dev->last.wmode = span->wmode;
1151			if (font != dev->last.font)
1152			{
1153				fz_drop_font(ctx, dev->last.font);
1154				dev->last.font = fz_keep_font(ctx, font);
1155			}
1156			dev->last.valid = 1;
1157			dev->last.flags = flags;
1158	
1159			/* Calculate bounding box and new pen position based on font metrics */
1160			if (span->items[i].gid >= 0)
1161				adv = span->items[i].adv;
1162			else
1163				adv = 0;
1164	
1165			unicode = span->items[i].ucs;
1166			if (unicode == FZ_REPLACEMENT_CHARACTER)
1167			{
1168				if (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_USE_CID_FOR_UNKNOWN_UNICODE)
1169				{
1170					unicode = span->items[i].cid;
1171					flags |= FZ_STEXT_UNICODE_IS_CID;
1172				}
1173				else if (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_USE_GID_FOR_UNKNOWN_UNICODE)
1174				{
1175					unicode = span->items[i].gid;
1176					flags |= FZ_STEXT_UNICODE_IS_GID;
1177				}
1178			}
1179	
1180			/* Send the chars we have through. */
1181			fz_add_stext_char(ctx, dev, font,
1182				unicode,
1183				span->items[i].gid,
1184				dev->last.trm,
1185				adv,
1186				dev->last.wmode,
1187				dev->last.bidi_level,
1188				(i == 0) && (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_SPANS),
1189				flags);
1190		}
1191	}
1192	
1193	static int
1194	rune_index(const char *utf8, size_t idx)
1195	{
1196		int rune;
1197	
1198		do
1199		{
1200			int len = fz_chartorune(&rune, utf8);
1201			if (rune == 0)
1202				return -1;
1203			utf8 += len;
1204		}
1205		while (idx--);
1206	
1207		return rune;
1208	}
1209	
1210	static void
1211	flush_actualtext(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev, const char *actualtext, int i, int end)
1212	{
1213		int glyph = -2;
1214	
1215		if (*actualtext == 0)
1216			return;
1217	
1218		if (!dev->last.valid)
1219			return;
1220	
1221		if (dev->flags & (FZ_STEXT_CLIP | FZ_STEXT_CLIP_RECT))
1222			if (dev->last.clipped)
1223				return;
1224	
1225		while (end < 0 || (end >= 0 && i < end))
1226		{
1227			int rune;
1228			actualtext += fz_chartorune(&rune, actualtext);
1229	
1230			if (rune == 0)
1231				break;
1232	
1233			fz_add_stext_char(ctx, dev, dev->last.font,
1234				rune,
1235				glyph,
1236				dev->last.trm,
1237				0,
1238				dev->last.wmode,
1239				dev->last.bidi_level,
1240				(i == 0) && (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_SPANS),
1241				dev->last.flags);
1242			i++;
1243	
1244			glyph = -1; /* -1 for all but first glyph in the actualtext run */
1245		}
1246	}
1247	
1248	static void
1249	do_extract_within_actualtext(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev, fz_text_span *span, fz_matrix ctm, metatext_t *mt, int flags)
1250	{
1251		/* We are within an actualtext block. This means we can't just add the chars
1252		 * as they are. We need to add the chars as they are meant to be. Sadly the
1253		 * actualtext mechanism doesn't help us at all with positioning. */
1254		fz_font *font = span->font;
1255		fz_matrix tm = span->trm;
1256		float adv;
1257		int start, i, end;
1258		char *actualtext = mt->text;
1259		size_t z = fz_utflen(actualtext);
1260	
1261		/* If actualtext is empty, nothing to do! */
1262		if (z == 0)
1263			return;
1264	
1265		/* Now, we HOPE that the creator of a PDF will minimise the actual text
1266		 * differences, so that we'll get:
1267		 *   "Politicians <ActualText="lie">fib</ActualText>, always."
1268		 * rather than:
1269		 *   "<ActualText="Politicians lie, always">Politicians fib, always.</ActualText>
1270		 * but experience with PDF files tells us that this won't always be the case.
1271		 *
1272		 * We try to minimise the actualtext section here, just in case.
1273		 */
1274	
1275		/* Spot a matching prefix and send it. */
1276		for (start = 0; start < span->len; start++)
1277		{
1278			int rune;
1279			int len = fz_chartorune(&rune, actualtext);
1280			if (span->items[start].ucs != rune || rune == 0)
1281				break;
1282			actualtext += len; z--;
1283		}
1284		if (start != 0)
1285			do_extract(ctx, dev, span, ctm, 0, start, flags);
1286	
1287		if (start == span->len)
1288		{
1289			/* The prefix has consumed all this object. Just shorten the actualtext and we'll
1290			 * catch the rest next time. */
1291			z = strlen(actualtext)+1;
1292			memmove(mt->text, actualtext, z);
1293			return;
1294		}
1295	
1296		/* We haven't consumed the whole string, so there must be runes left.
1297		 * Shut coverity up. */
1298		assert(z != 0);
1299	
1300		/* Spot a matching postfix. Can't send it til the end. */
1301		for (end = span->len; end > start; end--)
1302		{
1303			/* Nasty n^2 algo here, cos backtracking through utf8 is not trivial. It'll do. */
1304			int rune = rune_index(actualtext, z-1);
1305			if (span->items[end-1].ucs != rune)
1306				break;
1307			z--;
1308		}
1309		/* So we can send end -> span->len at the end. */
1310	
1311		/* So we have at least SOME chars that don't match. */
1312		/* Now, do the difficult bit in the middle.*/
1313		/* items[start..end] have to be sent with actualtext[start..z] */
1314		for (i = start; i < end; i++)
1315		{
1316			fz_text_item *item = &span->items[i];
1317			int rune = -1;
1318	
1319			if (dev->flags & (FZ_STEXT_CLIP | FZ_STEXT_CLIP_RECT))
1320			{
1321				fz_rect r = current_clip(ctx, dev);
1322				if (fz_glyph_entirely_outside_box(ctx, &ctm, span, &span->items[i], &r))
1323				{
1324					dev->last.clipped = 1;
1325					continue;
1326				}
1327			}
1328			dev->last.clipped = 0;
1329	
1330			if ((size_t)i < z)
1331				actualtext += fz_chartorune(&rune, actualtext);
1332	
1333			/* Calculate new pen location and delta */
1334			tm.e = item->x;
1335			tm.f = item->y;
1336			dev->last.trm = fz_concat(tm, ctm);
1337			dev->last.bidi_level = span->bidi_level;
1338			dev->last.wmode = span->wmode;
1339			if (font != dev->last.font)
1340			{
1341				fz_drop_font(ctx, dev->last.font);
1342				dev->last.font = fz_keep_font(ctx, font);
1343			}
1344			dev->last.valid = 1;
1345			dev->last.flags = flags;
1346	
1347			/* Calculate bounding box and new pen position based on font metrics */
1348			if (item->gid >= 0)
1349				adv = item->adv;
1350			else
1351				adv = 0;
1352	
1353			fz_add_stext_char(ctx, dev, font,
1354				rune,
1355				span->items[i].gid,
1356				dev->last.trm,
1357				adv,
1358				dev->last.wmode,
1359				dev->last.bidi_level,
1360				(i == 0) && (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_SPANS),
1361				flags);
1362		}
1363	
1364		/* If we haven't spotted a postfix by this point, then don't force ourselves to output
1365		 * any more of the actualtext at this point. We might get a new text object that matches
1366		 * more of it. */
1367		if (end == span->len)
1368		{
1369			/* Shorten actualtext and exit. */
1370			z = strlen(actualtext)+1;
1371			memmove(mt->text, actualtext, z);
1372			return;
1373		}
1374	
1375		/* if this is the first text on the page, and the actual text suffix matches the entire
1376		 * span text, then no font will have been set above, so set the last used font to the
1377		 * span font since flush_actualtext() assumes that a font has been set.
1378		 */
1379		if (!dev->last.font)
1380			dev->last.font = fz_keep_font(ctx, font);
1381	
1382		/* We found a matching postfix. It seems likely that this is going to be the only
1383		 * text object we get, so send any remaining actualtext now. */
1384		flush_actualtext(ctx, dev, actualtext, i, i + (int)strlen(actualtext) - (span->len - end));
1385	
1386		/* Send the postfix */
1387		if (end != span->len)
1388			do_extract(ctx, dev, span, ctm, end, span->len, flags);
1389	
1390		mt->text[0] = 0;
1391	}
1392	
1393	static void
1394	fz_stext_extract(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev, fz_text_span *span, fz_matrix ctm, int flags)
1395	{
1396		fz_stext_device *tdev = (fz_stext_device*)dev;
1397		metatext_t *mt = NULL;
1398	
1399		if (span->len == 0)
1400			return;
1401	
1402		/* Are we in an actualtext? */
1403		if (!(tdev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_IGNORE_ACTUALTEXT))
1404			mt = find_actualtext(dev);
1405	
1406		if (mt)
1407			do_extract_within_actualtext(ctx, dev, span, ctm, mt, flags);
1408		else
1409			do_extract(ctx, dev, span, ctm, 0, span->len, flags);
1410	}
1411	
1412	static uint32_t hexrgba_from_color(fz_context *ctx, fz_colorspace *colorspace, const float *color, float alpha)
1413	{
1414		float rgb[3];
1415		fz_convert_color(ctx, colorspace, color, fz_device_rgb(ctx), rgb, NULL, fz_default_color_params);
1416		return
1417			(((uint32_t) fz_clampi(alpha * 255 + 0.5f, 0, 255)) << 24) |
1418			(((uint32_t) fz_clampi(rgb[0] * 255 + 0.5f, 0, 255)) << 16) |
1419			(((uint32_t) fz_clampi(rgb[1] * 255 + 0.5f, 0, 255)) << 8) |
1420			(((uint32_t) fz_clampi(rgb[2] * 255 + 0.5f, 0, 255)));
1421	}

1423	static void
1424	fz_stext_fill_text(fz_context *ctx, fz_device *dev, const fz_text *text, fz_matrix ctm,
1425		fz_colorspace *colorspace, const float *color, float alpha, fz_color_params color_params)
1426	{
1427		fz_stext_device *tdev = (fz_stext_device*)dev;
1428		fz_text_span *span;
1429		if (text == tdev->lasttext && (tdev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_COLLECT_STYLES) == 0)
1430			return;
1431		tdev->color = hexrgba_from_color(ctx, colorspace, color, alpha);
1432		for (span = text->head; span; span = span->next)
1433			fz_stext_extract(ctx, tdev, span, ctm, FZ_STEXT_FILLED);
1434		fz_drop_text(ctx, tdev->lasttext);
1435		tdev->lasttext = fz_keep_text(ctx, text);
1436	}

1494	
1495	static void
1496	fz_stext_begin_metatext(fz_context *ctx, fz_device *dev, fz_metatext meta, const char *text)
1497	{
1498		fz_stext_device *tdev = (fz_stext_device*)dev;
1499		metatext_t *mt = find_actualtext(tdev);
1500		char *new_text = NULL;
1501	
1502		if (mt != NULL && meta == FZ_METATEXT_ACTUALTEXT)
1503			flush_actualtext(ctx, tdev, mt->text, 0, -1);
1504	
1505		if (meta == FZ_METATEXT_ACTUALTEXT)
1506			tdev->last.valid = 0;
1507	
1508		new_text = text ? fz_strdup(ctx, text) : NULL;
1509	
1510		fz_try(ctx)
1511		{
1512			mt = fz_malloc_struct(ctx, metatext_t);
1513	
1514			mt->prev = tdev->metatext;
1515			tdev->metatext = mt;
1516			mt->type = meta;
1517			mt->text = new_text;
1518			mt->bounds = fz_empty_rect;
1519		}
1520		fz_catch(ctx)
1521		{
1522			fz_free(ctx, new_text);
1523			fz_rethrow(ctx);
1524		}
1525	}
1526	
1527	static void
1528	pop_metatext(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *dev)
1529	{
1530		metatext_t *prev;
1531		fz_rect bounds;
1532	
1533		if (!dev->metatext)
1534			return;
1535	
1536		prev = dev->metatext->prev;
1537		bounds = dev->metatext->bounds;
1538		fz_free(ctx, dev->metatext->text);
1539		fz_free(ctx, dev->metatext);
1540		dev->metatext = prev;
1541		if (prev)
1542			prev->bounds = fz_union_rect(prev->bounds, bounds);
1543	}
1544	
1545	static void
1546	fz_stext_end_metatext(fz_context *ctx, fz_device *dev)
1547	{
1548		fz_stext_device *tdev = (fz_stext_device*)dev;
1549		fz_font *myfont = NULL;
1550	
1551		if (!tdev->metatext)
1552			return; /* Mismatched pop. Live with it. */
1553	
1554		if (tdev->metatext->type != FZ_METATEXT_ACTUALTEXT || (tdev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_IGNORE_ACTUALTEXT) != 0)
1555		{
1556			/* We only deal with ActualText here. Just pop anything else off,
1557			 * and we're done. */
1558			pop_metatext(ctx, tdev);
1559			return;
1560		}
1561	
1562		/* If we have a 'last' text position, send the content after that. */
1563		if (tdev->last.valid)
1564		{
1565			tdev->last.trm.e = tdev->pen.x;
1566			tdev->last.trm.f = tdev->pen.y;
1567	
1568			flush_actualtext(ctx, tdev, tdev->metatext->text, 0, -1);
1569			pop_metatext(ctx, tdev);
1570			tdev->last.valid = 0;
1571			return;
1572		}
1573	
1574		/* Unless we have collected a rectangle for content that encloses the actual text,
1575		 * we can't do anything. */
1576		if (fz_is_empty_rect(tdev->metatext->bounds))
1577		{
1578			if ((dev->flags & (FZ_STEXT_CLIP | FZ_STEXT_CLIP_RECT)) == 0 && tdev->metatext->text[0])
1579				fz_warn(ctx, "ActualText with no position. Text may be lost or mispositioned.");
1580			pop_metatext(ctx, tdev);
1581			return;
1582		}
1583	
1584		/* We have a rectangle, so send the text to fill that. */
1585		tdev->last.trm.a = tdev->metatext->bounds.x1 - tdev->metatext->bounds.x0;
1586		tdev->last.trm.b = 0;
1587		tdev->last.trm.c = 0;
1588		tdev->last.trm.d = tdev->metatext->bounds.y0 - tdev->metatext->bounds.y1;
1589		tdev->last.trm.e = tdev->metatext->bounds.x0;
1590		tdev->last.trm.f = tdev->metatext->bounds.y1;
1591		tdev->last.valid = 1;
1592	
1593		fz_var(myfont);
1594	
1595		fz_try(ctx)
1596		{
1597			if (tdev->last.font == NULL)
1598			{
1599				myfont = fz_new_base14_font(ctx, "Helvetica");
1600				tdev->last.font = myfont;
1601			}
1602			flush_actualtext(ctx, tdev, tdev->metatext->text, 0, -1);
1603			pop_metatext(ctx, tdev);
1604		}
1605		fz_always(ctx)
1606		{
1607			if (myfont)
1608			{
1609				tdev->last.font = NULL;
1610				fz_drop_font(ctx, myfont);
1611			}
1612		}
1613		fz_catch(ctx)
1614			fz_rethrow(ctx);
1615	}
1616	
1617	
1618	/* Images and shadings */
1619	
1620	static void
1621	fz_stext_fill_image(fz_context *ctx, fz_device *dev, fz_image *img, fz_matrix ctm, float alpha, fz_color_params color_params)
1622	{
1623		fz_stext_device *tdev = (fz_stext_device*)dev;
1624		fz_rect *bounds = actualtext_bounds(tdev);
1625	
1626		/* If there is an actualtext in force, update its bounds. */
1627		if (bounds)
1628		{
1629			static const fz_rect unit = { 0, 0, 1, 1 };
1630			*bounds = fz_union_rect(*bounds, fz_transform_rect(unit, ctm));
1631		}
1632	
1633		/* Unless we are being told to preserve images, nothing to do here. */
1634		if ((tdev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_IMAGES) == 0)
1635			return;
1636	
1637		/* If the alpha is less than 50% then it's probably a watermark or effect or something. Skip it. */
1638		if (alpha >= 0.5f)
1639		{
1640			fz_stext_block *block;
1641			flush_lazy_vectors(ctx, tdev->page, tdev);
1642			block = add_image_block_to_page(ctx, tdev->page, ctm, img, tdev->id);
1643			if (tdev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_CLIP)
1644			{
1645				fz_rect clip = fz_device_current_scissor(ctx, dev);
1646				clip = fz_intersect_rect(clip, tdev->page->mediabox);
1647				block->bbox = fz_intersect_rect(block->bbox, clip);
1648			}
1649		}
1650	}
1651	
1652	static void
1653	fz_stext_fill_image_mask(fz_context *ctx, fz_device *dev, fz_image *img, fz_matrix ctm,
1654			fz_colorspace *cspace, const float *color, float alpha, fz_color_params color_params)
1655	{
1656		fz_stext_fill_image(ctx, dev, img, ctm, alpha, color_params);
1657	}
1658	
1659	static fz_image *
1660	fz_new_image_from_shade(fz_context *ctx, fz_shade *shade, fz_matrix *in_out_ctm, fz_color_params color_params, fz_rect scissor)
1661	{
1662		fz_matrix ctm = *in_out_ctm;
1663		fz_pixmap *pix;
1664		fz_image *img = NULL;
1665		fz_rect bounds;
1666		fz_irect bbox;
1667	
1668		bounds = fz_bound_shade(ctx, shade, ctm);
1669		bounds = fz_intersect_rect(bounds, scissor);
1670		bbox = fz_irect_from_rect(bounds);
1671	
1672		pix = fz_new_pixmap_with_bbox(ctx, fz_device_rgb(ctx), bbox, NULL, !shade->use_background);
1673		fz_try(ctx)
1674		{
1675			if (shade->use_background)
1676				fz_fill_pixmap_with_color(ctx, pix, shade->colorspace, shade->background, color_params);
1677			else
1678				fz_clear_pixmap(ctx, pix);
1679			fz_paint_shade(ctx, shade, NULL, ctm, pix, color_params, bbox, NULL, NULL);
1680			img = fz_new_image_from_pixmap(ctx, pix, NULL);
1681		}
1682		fz_always(ctx)
1683			fz_drop_pixmap(ctx, pix);
1684		fz_catch(ctx)
1685			fz_rethrow(ctx);
1686	
1687		in_out_ctm->a = pix->w;
1688		in_out_ctm->b = 0;
1689		in_out_ctm->c = 0;
1690		in_out_ctm->d = pix->h;
1691		in_out_ctm->e = pix->x;
1692		in_out_ctm->f = pix->y;
1693		return img;
1694	}
1695	
1696	static void
1697	fz_stext_fill_shade(fz_context *ctx, fz_device *dev, fz_shade *shade, fz_matrix ctm, float alpha, fz_color_params color_params)
1698	{
1699		fz_stext_device *tdev = (fz_stext_device*)dev;
1700		fz_matrix local_ctm;
1701		fz_rect scissor;
1702		fz_image *image;
1703	
1704		/* If we aren't preserving images, don't waste time making the shade. */
1705		if ((tdev->opts.flags & FZ_STEXT_PRESERVE_IMAGES) == 0)
1706		{
1707			/* But we do still need to handle actualtext bounds. */
1708			fz_rect *bounds = actualtext_bounds(tdev);
1709			if (bounds)
1710				*bounds = fz_union_rect(*bounds, fz_bound_shade(ctx, shade, ctm));
1711			return;
1712		}
1713	
1714		local_ctm = ctm;
1715		scissor = fz_device_current_scissor(ctx, dev);
1716		if (dev->flags & FZ_STEXT_CLIP_RECT)
1717			scissor = fz_intersect_rect(scissor, tdev->opts.clip);
1718		scissor = fz_intersect_rect(scissor, tdev->page->mediabox);
1719		image = fz_new_image_from_shade(ctx, shade, &local_ctm, color_params, scissor);
1720		fz_try(ctx)
1721			fz_stext_fill_image(ctx, dev, image, local_ctm, alpha, color_params);
1722		fz_always(ctx)
1723			fz_drop_image(ctx, image);
1724		fz_catch(ctx)
1725			fz_rethrow(ctx);
1726	}
1727	
1728	static void
1729	fixup_bboxes_and_bidi(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_block *block)
1730	{
1731		fz_stext_line *line;
1732		fz_stext_char *ch;
1733	
1734		for ( ; block != NULL; block = block->next)
1735		{
1736			if (block->type == FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_STRUCT)
1737			{
1738				if (block->u.s.down)
1739				{
1740					fz_stext_block *block2;
1741					fixup_bboxes_and_bidi(ctx, block->u.s.down->first_block);
1742					for (block2 = block->u.s.down->first_block; block2 != NULL; block2 = block2->next)
1743					{
1744						block->bbox = fz_union_rect(block->bbox, block2->bbox);
1745					}
1746				}
1747			}
1748			if (block->type != FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_TEXT)
1749				continue;
1750			for (line = block->u.t.first_line; line; line = line->next)
1751			{
1752				int reorder = 0;
1753				for (ch = line->first_char; ch; ch = ch->next)
1754				{
1755					fz_rect ch_box = fz_rect_from_quad(ch->quad);
1756					if (ch == line->first_char)
1757						line->bbox = ch_box;
1758					else
1759						line->bbox = fz_union_rect(line->bbox, ch_box);
1760					if (ch->bidi == 3)
1761						reorder = 1;
1762				}
1763				block->bbox = fz_union_rect(block->bbox, line->bbox);
1764				if (reorder)
1765					reverse_bidi_line(line);
1766			}
1767		}
1768	}
1769	
1770	static void
1771	advance_to_x(fz_point *a, fz_point b, float x)
1772	{
1773		a->y += (b.y - a->y) * (x - a->x) / (b.x - a->x);
1774		a->x = x;
1775	}
1776	
1777	static void
1778	advance_to_y(fz_point *a, fz_point b, float y)
1779	{
1780		a->x += (b.x - a->x) * (y - a->y) / (b.y - a->y);
1781		a->y = y;
1782	}
1783	
1784	static int
1785	line_crosses_rect(fz_point a, fz_point b, fz_rect r)
1786	{
1787		/* Cope with trivial exclusions */
1788		if (a.x < r.x0 && b.x < r.x0)
1789			return 0;
1790		if (a.x > r.x1 && b.x > r.x1)
1791			return 0;
1792		if (a.y < r.y0 && b.y < r.y0)
1793			return 0;
1794		if (a.y > r.y1 && b.y > r.y1)
1795			return 0;
1796	
1797		if (a.x < r.x0)
1798			advance_to_x(&a, b, r.x0);
1799		if (a.x > r.x1)
1800			advance_to_x(&a, b, r.x1);
1801		if (a.y < r.y0)
1802			advance_to_y(&a, b, r.y0);
1803		if (a.y > r.y1)
1804			advance_to_y(&a, b, r.y1);
1805	
1806		return fz_is_point_inside_rect(a, r);
1807	}
1808	
1809	static float
1810	calculate_ascent(fz_point p, fz_point origin, fz_point dir)
1811	{
1812		return fabsf((origin.x-p.x)*dir.y - (origin.y-p.y)*dir.x);
1813	}
1814	
1815	/* Create us a rect from the given quad, but extend it downwards
1816	 * to allow for underlines that pass under the glyphs. */
1817	static fz_rect expanded_rect_from_quad(fz_quad quad, fz_point dir, fz_point origin, float size)
1818	{
1819		/* Consider the two rects from A and g respectively.
1820		 *
1821		 * ul +------+ ur   or
1822		 *    |  /\  |         ul +------+ ur
1823		 *    | /__\ |            | /''\ |
1824		 *    |/    \|            |(    ||
1825		 * ll +------+ lr         | ''''||
1826		 *                        |  ''' | <-expected underline level
1827		 *                     ll +------+ lr
1828		 *
1829		 * So an underline won't cross A's rect, but will cross g's.
1830		 * We want to make a rect that includes a suitable amount of
1831		 * space underneath. The information we have available to us
1832		 * is summed up here:
1833		 *
1834		 *  ul +---------+ ur
1835		 *     |         |
1836		 *     | origin  |
1837		 *     |+----------> dir
1838		 *     |         |
1839		 *  ll +---------+ lr
1840		 *
1841		 * Consider the distance from ul to the line that passes through
1842		 * the origin with direction dir. Similarly, consider the distance
1843		 * from ur to the same line. This can be thought of as the 'ascent'
1844		 * of this character.
1845		 *
1846		 * We'd like the distance from ul to ll to be greater than this, so
1847		 * as to ensure we cover the possible location where an underline
1848		 * might reasonably go.
1849		 *
1850		 * If we have a line (l) through point A with direction vector u,
1851		 * the distance between point P and line(l) is:
1852		 *
1853		 * d(P,l) = || AP x u || / || u ||
1854		 *
1855		 * where x is the cross product.
1856		 *
1857		 * For us, because || dir || = 1:
1858		 *
1859		 * d(ul, origin) = || (origin-ul) x dir ||
1860		 *
1861		 * The cross product is only defined in 3 (or 7!) dimensions, so
1862		 * extend both vectors into 3d by defining a 0 z component.
1863		 *
1864		 * (origin-ul) x dir = [ (origin.y - ul.y) . 0     - 0                 . dir.y ]
1865		 *                     [ 0                 . dir.x - (origin.x - ul.y) . 0     ]
1866		 *                     [ (origin.x - ul.x) . dir.y - (origin.y - ul.y) . dir.x ]
1867		 *
1868		 * So d(ul, origin) = abs(D) where D = (origin.x-ul.x).dir.y - (origin.y-ul.y).dir.x
1869		 */
1870		float ascent = (calculate_ascent(quad.ul, origin, dir) + calculate_ascent(quad.ur, origin, dir)) / 2;
1871		fz_point left = { quad.ll.x - quad.ul.x, quad.ll.y - quad.ul.y };
1872		fz_point right = { quad.lr.x - quad.ur.x, quad.lr.y - quad.ur.y };
1873		float height = (hypotf(left.x, left.y) + hypotf(right.x, right.y))/2;
1874		int neg = 0;
1875		float extra_rise = 0;
1876	
1877		/* Spaces will have 0 ascent. underscores will have small ascent.
1878		 * We want a sane ascent to be able to spot strikeouts, but not
1879		 * so big that it incorporates lines above the text, like borders. */
1880		if (ascent < 0.75*size)
1881			extra_rise = 0.75*size - ascent;
1882	
1883		/* We'd like height to be at least ascent + 1/4 size */
1884		if (height < 0)
1885			neg = 1, height = -height;
1886		if (height < ascent + size * 0.25f)
1887			height = ascent + size * 0.25f;
1888	
1889		height -= ascent;
1890		if (neg)
1891			height = -height;
1892		quad.ll.x += - height * dir.y;
1893		quad.ll.y +=   height * dir.x;
1894		quad.lr.x += - height * dir.y;
1895		quad.lr.y +=   height * dir.x;
1896		quad.ul.x -= - extra_rise * dir.y;
1897		quad.ul.y -=   extra_rise * dir.x;
1898		quad.ur.x -= - extra_rise * dir.y;
1899		quad.ur.y -=   extra_rise * dir.x;
1900	
1901		return fz_rect_from_quad(quad);
1902	}

1904	static int feq(float a,float b)
1905	{
1906	#define EPSILON 0.00001
1907		a -= b;
1908		if (a < 0)
1909			a = -a;
1910		return a < EPSILON;
1911	}

1913	static void
1914	check_strikeout(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_block *block, fz_point from, fz_point to, fz_point dir, float thickness)
1915	{
1916		for ( ; block; block = block->next)
1917		{
1918			fz_stext_line *line;
1919	
1920			if (block->type != FZ_STEXT_BLOCK_TEXT)
1921				continue;
1922	
1923			for (line = block->u.t.first_line; line != NULL; line = line->next)
1924			{
1925				fz_stext_char *ch;
1926	
1927				if ((!feq(line->dir.x, dir.x) || !feq(line->dir.y, dir.y)) &&
1928					(!feq(line->dir.x, -dir.x) || !feq(line->dir.y, -dir.y)))
1929					continue;
1930	
1931				/* Matching directions... */
1932	
1933				/* Unfortunately, we don't have a valid line->bbox at this point, so we need to check
1934				 * chars. - FIXME: Now we do! */
1935				for (ch = line->first_char; ch; ch = ch->next)
1936				{
1937					fz_point up;
1938					float dx, dy, dot;
1939					fz_rect ch_box;
1940	
1941					ch_box = expanded_rect_from_quad(ch->quad, line->dir, ch->origin, ch->size);
1942	
1943					if (!line_crosses_rect(from, to, ch_box))
1944						continue;
1945	
1946					/* If the thickness is more than a 1/4 of the size, it's a highlight, not a
1947					 * line! */
1948					if (ch->size < thickness*4)
1949					{
1950						/* Distinguish from a background fill */
1951						if (thickness <= ch->size*1.5f)
1952							ch->flags |= FZ_STEXT_HIGHLIGHT;
1953						continue;
1954					}
1955	
1956					/* Is this a strikeout or an underline? */
1957	
1958					/* The baseline moves from ch->origin in the direction line->dir */
1959					up.x = line->dir.y;
1960					up.y = -line->dir.x;
1961	
1962					/* How far is our line displaced from the line through the origin? */
1963					dx = from.x - ch->origin.x;
1964					dy = from.y - ch->origin.y;
1965					/* Dot product with up. up is normalised */
1966					dot = dx * up.x + dy * up.y;
1967	
1968					if (dot > 0 && dot <= 0.8f * ch->font->ascender * ch->size)
1969						ch->flags |= FZ_STEXT_STRIKEOUT;
1970					else
1971						ch->flags |= FZ_STEXT_UNDERLINE;
1972				}
1973			}
1974		}
1975	}

1977	static void
1978	check_rects_for_strikeout(fz_context *ctx, fz_stext_device *tdev, fz_stext_page *page)
1979	{
1980		int i, n = tdev->rect_len;
1981	
1982		for (i = 0; i < n; i++)
1983		{
1984			fz_point from = tdev->rects[i].from;
1985			fz_point to = tdev->rects[i].to;
1986			float thickness = tdev->rects[i].thickness;
1987			fz_point dir;
1988			dir.x = to.x - from.x;
1989			dir.y = to.y - from.y;
1990			dir = fz_normalize_vector(dir);
1991	
1992			check_strikeout(ctx, page->first_block, from, to, dir, thickness);
1993		}
1994	}
